feed.title: danielryanspaulding
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from danielryanspaulding

entry.title: Today Purple Hair Girl learns about Holocaust Inversion & how intellectually dishonest & hateful it is — to equivocate the war in Gaza that Israel didn’t start which has the lowest civilian to combatant death ratios in modern history — to the systematic,
entry.content: Today Purple Hair Girl learns about Holocaust Inversion & how intellectually dishonest & hateful it is — to equivocate the war in Gaza that Israel didn’t start which has the lowest civilian to combatant death ratios in modern history — to the systematic,

entry.title: Everyone needs to tell @cynthiaenixon & @rosie to stop being mouthpieces for the Islamist Republic of Iran. They are sharing factually untrue, unverified information from Qatari news agencies that are fueling Anti-American hate. Hamas is a TERRORIST organ
entry.content: Everyone needs to tell @cynthiaenixon & @rosie to stop being mouthpieces for the Islamist Republic of Iran. They are sharing factually untrue, unverified information from Qatari news agencies that are fueling Anti-American hate. Hamas is a TERRORIST organ

entry.title: Lizzo @lizzobeeating whhhhyyyy, please stooooppp. If anyone paid you to do this video return the money & contact a lawyer immediately. Please talk to some cool Israelis & learn more. Also support the hostages at @bringhomenow @bring.hersh.home @bringornow
entry.content: Lizzo @lizzobeeating whhhhyyyy, please stooooppp. If anyone paid you to do this video return the money & contact a lawyer immediately. Please talk to some cool Israelis & learn more. Also support the hostages at @bringhomenow @bring.hersh.home @bringornow

entry.title: Please stop: I’m telling you this as a progressive gay guy. This is a dangerous, unhinged, anti-American movement that is going to get Trump elected & I don’t want that. We will have right-wing extremism & I love democracy. Israel existing is a bipartisan
entry.content: Please stop: I’m telling you this as a progressive gay guy. This is a dangerous, unhinged, anti-American movement that is going to get Trump elected & I don’t want that. We will have right-wing extremism & I love democracy. Israel existing is a bipartisan

entry.title: 1/4 Part Interview with Peace activist Hamza Howidy @hazzah1997 who is one of the first young Gazans speaking out against Hamas. He has written several articles with @newsweek urging protesters worldwide not to glorify or legitimize Hamas & has condemned

entry.title: Today we‘re going to talk about how the IRI is destroying America through ideologues & political polarization & give you some sassy examples — and then I’m gonna use my Power Gay Skills & tell you how to stop them ;)
entry.content: Today we‘re going to talk about how the IRI is destroying America through ideologues & political polarization & give you some sassy examples — and then I’m gonna use my Power Gay Skills & tell you how to stop them ;)

entry.title: @bringomerhome Hey Jon Stewart, I truly believe you have the ability to lead the Left out of the mess we are in. The USA has fallen into extremism — there are no moderates communicating with each other. The Israel-Hamas war is spiraling the left into radi
entry.content: @bringomerhome Hey Jon Stewart, I truly believe you have the ability to lead the Left out of the mess we are in. The USA has fallen into extremism — there are no moderates communicating with each other. The Israel-Hamas war is spiraling the left into radi

entry.title: Part 4/4 of my interview with Yemeni human rights activist Luai Ahmed @justluai — in this segment we cover how harmful the term Pinkwashing is, his experience as a gay refugee in Sweden. We have bonus episode next week of the interview 🌈❤️💕
entry.content: Part 4/4 of my interview with Yemeni human rights activist Luai Ahmed @justluai — in this segment we cover how harmful the term Pinkwashing is, his experience as a gay refugee in Sweden. We have bonus episode next week of the interview 🌈❤️💕

entry.title: Joy Behar is a very smart woman. At what point did you all forget that Hamas is a terrorist regime? Or you just want to make excuses for them? Or buy into conspiracy theories? Or live in a delusion that they’re freedom fighters? You’ve been completely rad
entry.content: Joy Behar is a very smart woman. At what point did you all forget that Hamas is a terrorist regime? Or you just want to make excuses for them? Or buy into conspiracy theories? Or live in a delusion that they’re freedom fighters? You’ve been completely rad

entry.title: Hamas is a Islamic Terrorist regime that has held the Gazan people hostages for 18yrs & has radicalized them. Their goal is the destruction of Israel, not "freeing" anyone. Hamas is a Proxy regime of the Islamic Republic of Iran that wants to destroy the
entry.content: Hamas is a Islamic Terrorist regime that has held the Gazan people hostages for 18yrs & has radicalized them. Their goal is the destruction of Israel, not "freeing" anyone. Hamas is a Proxy regime of the Islamic Republic of Iran that wants to destroy the
